⌥1-4/⌥N/⌥F all route (⌥F→#/issues, forum renamed); Esc changes no page hash; top row = ＋ & search pills only; rail tooltips carry ⌥ hints; 0 console errors

Browser YATU (headless Chromium, worktree dashboard→backend): clicked each rail entry — graph→#/graph, sessions→#/sessions/new, issues→#/issues, settings→#/settings, the clicked entry accented (aria-current) each time; browser Back returned to #/issues; a direct deep-load of #/settings opened on settings (gear accented, no graph flash). Rail tooltips carry ⌥ hints. 0 console errors. Re-measured at HEAD 6064e12 (self-staled at 93acf96); UI unchanged.

Browser YATU: ⌥1/⌥2/⌥3/⌥4 (physical digits) → graph/sessions/issues/settings from any page; ⌥N → #/sessions/new with the New composer focused + the ＋ pill accented; ⌥F → #/issues from both the session board and settings; Esc changed NO page hash on the board or issues (overlay-closer only); rail tooltips read 'Spec Node Graph (⌥1)' etc.; console top row = ＋ & search pills only (forum pill gone). 0 console errors. Re-measured at HEAD 6064e12.

Rail shows FIVE entries in order: Spec Node Graph(⌥1)·Session Board(⌥2)·Evals(⌥3/⌥F)·Issues(⌥4)·Settings(⌥5). Clicking each routes to #/graph·#/sessions·#/evals·#/issues·#/settings with the clicked entry accented (aria-current); Back walks pages; direct #/settings load opens settings (no graph flash). Rail/URL/page never disagree.

From the graph: ⌥3→#/evals, ⌥4→#/issues, ⌥5→#/settings (physical e.code digits); ⌥F→#/evals and bare board f→#/evals (evals lead). Esc changes no page hash. Rail tooltips carry the ⌥ hints (e.g. 'Evals (⌥3 / ⌥F)'). One global switch vocabulary; Esc is overlay-closer only.
